text.message: lol you have a fun set up
you seem to be doing well lol
in reality i least want to steal from u
If you want brick dont block the brick
i didnt block it, in fact im on it lol
why didnt u want to give me sheep?
i was going to give u ore most likely which u want anyways
this is good for a meme video
just like u, blue, im hoping for a 6 roll
red used it for the settle
me and blue have been blocked for a long time
i dont know what to say
but u can trade ur wood (that u dont have) 1 for 1
In what world do you steal from me?
Make the wrong play again please
and probly has win in hand
i feel like im with my ex again
but prob the only game like this in a while
